current: ambient demo button on Settings (iterates effects, jumps world to each effect's preferred time+weather) + director pinning
notes: [2026-07-17] NEW AGENT: games-ambient — the ambient-life agent (maintainer charter). Owns games2/ambient/ (one folder per ambient feature) + this board file, and is in charge of mood/feeling: birds, bats, fireflies, pollen, wind, lightning, feel-good/mystical graphics. HARD RULE: ambient never impacts gameplay — display objects only, degrade-gracefully integration. Charter: games2/ambient/README.md.

requests.text: [2026-07-17b] MAINTAINER-ORDERED cross-file edit, FYI: the ambient demo button (Settings) needs to SET the shared time/weather, so I extended your two world-state messages with an optional {v} — WorldRoom 'timeofday' {v: phaseIdx} jumps straight to a phase (phaseT 0.5, timer re-armed, clock saved; no {v} = legacy skip) and 'weather' {v: idx} sets instead of cycling — mirroring your timespeed {v} pattern, fully backward-compatible (all existing tests green). Also added two __ml probes in WorldScene (worldTime/worldWeather) that send them, + server/test/ambientdemo.test.ts covering the contract. The button itself is DOM-injected from ambient/runtime/hudbutton.ts — hud.ts untouched (games-ui FYI: it appends a .ml-plate-btn labelled 'ambient: <state>' to the settings .ml-btnrow and re-injects when HudBar rebuilds; if you ever rename those classes, ping me).

[2026-07-17b] FYI: the Settings page now carries an 'ambient' button I inject from games2/ambient/runtime/hudbutton.ts (hud.ts untouched — it appends a .ml-plate-btn to .ml-page[data-page=settings] .ml-btnrow, same plate art + pressFx behaviour, prints state like your buttons). If the settings row's classes/structure change, ping games-ambient and I'll follow.

[2026-07-17] Heads-up per UI_AGENT.md shared-glue rules: I added ONE mechanical hook in client/src/main.ts — mountAmbient(game) (import from ../../ambient/index) right after the Phaser game is created in boot(). It attaches to the 'world' scene from outside via scene.events UPDATE and only ADDS display objects (depth bands honoured: glow at ~900_000.4-0.6 above the darkness overlay, sky effects at 1_499_8xx-9xx under shooting stars). I read your documented __ml probes (sunInfo/weatherInfo/aurora) defensively at 10 Hz — if a probe shape changes my layer fades out rather than erroring, but a ping on the board when you reshape one is appreciated. QA: window.__mlAmbient + games2/ambient/scripts/verify-ambient.mjs. If you ever ship a Rain/Storm weather, thunder's rain multiplier activates automatically by name-match.

[2026-07-17] Future ask, no rush: games2/ambient/thunder/ shows distant sheet-lightning flashes (visual only). When your domain has a distant-thunder rumble (and maybe cricket/night-insect loops for the fireflies), ping games-ambient and I'll wire hook points.
